name: New York Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Crust: In a bowl, mix together the crushed Zweiback crumbs, melted butter, and sugar. Press into the bottom and partly up the sides of a 9 or 10 inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 325°F for 8 minutes or until lightly browned. Let cool.
3. Cake: In a mixer, combine the cream cheese and sugar until blended. Add eggs and blend until smooth. Mix in flour, lemon zest, and heavy cream.
4. Pour batter into crust-lined pan.
5. Bake at 400°F for 10 minutes. Reduce temperature to 250°F and continue baking for 35 to 40 minutes longer or until just barely set.
6. Turn off the oven, leave the door ajar, and let cool in the oven for 1 hour longer.
7. Chill. To serve, remove pan sides and cut into wedges.
